docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OWYANG, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT MOUSSA, BASSEM DR., D.D.S. MOUSSA, LALILA B. DR., D.D.S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-1996 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
